---
title: "Reputed Changeling, or, Three Seventh Years Two Centuries Ago, A 2 vols."
---

## Reputed Changeling, or, Three Seventh Years Two Centuries Ago, A 2 vols.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1889
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
